name: Kanban Zone
description: Generic Kanban Zone CLI. Works against any board the API key can see. Read board state, create/move/update cards, add comments.
context: Kanban Zone generic CLI. Helper: python3 {{PROJECT_PATH}}/skills/kanbanzone/scripts/kz.py <verb> [--board ID] [...]. API key: ~/.config/kanbanzone/config.json (api_key + optional default_board_id) or KZ_API_KEY env. Verbs: list-boards, verify, refresh-cache, list-cards, find, create-card, bulk-create, move-card, update-card, comment, dump, diagnose. Every verb except list-boards/diagnose accepts --board ID; falls back to default_board_id. Card numbers (#N) are board-local. Don't delete cards — archive instead. Full docs at skills/kanbanzone/SKILL.md and skills/kanbanzone/references/.
